title: World Model Failure Classification and Anomaly Detection for Autonomous Inspection
authors: Michelle Ho;Muhammad Fadhil Ginting;Isaac R. Ward;Andrzej Reinke;Mykel J. Kochenderfer;Ali-akbar Agha-Mohammadi;Shayegan Omidshafiei
classification_rationale: Preliminary strict-world-model proposal because a compressed latent state is advanced to a next-frame prediction and its errors support anticipatory failure and OOD detection; pending dual human review
evidence_locations: Figure 3; Section III-E; Equation 7; Table I; Section IV
datasets: Gauge inspection video dataset from office and industrial sites
notes: Pilot candidate only; classification and metadata are not verified consensus

title: Foundational World Models Accurately Detect Bimanual Manipulator Failures
authors: Isaac R. Ward;Michelle Ho;Houjun Liu;Aaron Feldman;Joseph Vincent;Liam Kruse;Sean Cheong;Duncan Eddy;Mykel J. Kochenderfer;Mac Schwager
venue: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
classification_rationale: Preliminary strict-world-model proposal because multimodal state-action histories drive a probabilistic latent next-state model used for failure monitoring; the limited demonstrated horizon remains a human-review question; pending dual human review
evidence_locations: Figure 1; Section III-A; Equations 1-4; Section III-B; Figure 7
metrics: failure detection rate;class-weighted accuracy;time to detection
notes: Pilot candidate only; classification and metadata are not verified consensus

title: Robust Anomaly Detection for Multivariate Time Series through Stochastic Recurrent Neural Network
authors: Ya Su;Youjian Zhao;Chenhao Niu;Rong Liu;Wei Sun;Dan Pei
venue: 25th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
classification_rationale: Preliminary world-model-like proposal because stochastic latent variables have explicit recurrent dependence and reconstruction probability drives anomaly scoring; future-state rollout is not demonstrated and dual human review is pending
notes: Pilot candidate only; classification and metadata are not verified consensus

title: Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection via Graph Attention Network
authors: Hang Zhao;Yujing Wang;Juanyong Duan;Congrui Huang;Defu Cao;Yunhai Tong;Bixiong Xu;Jing Bai;Jie Tong;Qi Zhang
venue: 2020 IEEE International Conference on Data Mining
classification_rationale: Preliminary world-model-like proposal because graph-attended temporal representations feed a next-timestamp forecast used jointly with reconstruction for anomaly scoring; only one-step prediction is shown and dual human review is pending
evidence_locations: Figure 2; Section III-B; Section III-D; Equations 5-8; Table III
notes: Pilot candidate only; no official author code URL was confirmed

title: Learning Representations with End-to-End Models for Improved Remaining Useful Life Prognostic
classification_rationale: Preliminary related-predictive-model proposal because learned MLP features and LSTM smoothing feed direct scalar RUL regression without an explicit reusable future-state rollout; pending dual human review
notes: Pilot boundary candidate; unknown objective records the current vocabulary gap for direct scalar regression

title: Ensemble Neural Networks for Remaining Useful Life (RUL) Prediction
venue: 4th Asia Pacific Conference of the Prognostics and Health Management Society
classification_rationale: Preliminary uncertain proposal because an LSTM ensemble provides probabilistic scalar RUL and separates uncertainty sources but does not clearly expose a reusable state transition or rollout; pending dual human review
evidence_locations: Section III-B; Equations 2-5; Section IV-B; Equations 6-9; Table II
notes: Pilot boundary candidate; no official code URL was confirmed

title: Remaining Useful Life Estimation Using Functional Data Analysis
authors: Qiyao Wang;Shuai Zheng;Ahmed Farahat;Susumu Serita;Chetan Gupta
venue: 2019 IEEE International Conference on Prognostics and Health Management
classification_rationale: Preliminary related-predictive-model proposal because functional sensor curves are mapped directly to scalar RUL without an explicit learned transition or future-state rollout; pending dual human review
evidence_locations: Section II-A; Figure 2; Equations 2-5; Section II-C; Table III
notes: Pilot boundary candidate; unknown objective records the current vocabulary gap for direct scalar regression
